name: pj-peru-scraper
description: TypeScript HTTP scraper for Peruvian judicial portals — axios + cheerio, no browser automation

scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.verify:local: npm run build && npm run simulate:429
scripts.scrape:oefa:test100: npm run build && node dist/cli.js --site oefa --limit 100 --pdfs --pdf-dir output/test100/pdfs --out output/test100/oefa-documents.jsonl --pdf-concurrency 4 --fresh-output
scripts.scrape:oefa:mineria: npm run build && node dist/cli.js --site oefa --sector 1 --pdfs --pdf-dir output/mineria/pdfs --out output/mineria/oefa-documents.jsonl --pdf-concurrency 4 --fresh-output
scripts.scrape:oefa:mineria:resume: npm run build && node dist/cli.js --site oefa --sector 1 --pdfs --pdf-dir output/mineria/pdfs --out output/mineria/oefa-documents.jsonl --pdf-concurrency 4 --resume
scripts.scrape:oefa:parallel: npm run build && node scripts/parallel-sectors.mjs --site oefa --pdfs --pdf-dir output/oefa/pdfs --pdf-concurrency 20
scripts.scrape:oefa:parallel:dry: npm run build && node scripts/parallel-sectors.mjs --site oefa --dry-run
scripts.scrape:pjperu:full: npm run build && node scripts/parallel-sectors.mjs --site pj-peru --pdfs --pdf-dir output/pjperu-full/pdfs --pdf-concurrency 5
scripts.scrape:pjperu:full:resume: npm run build && node scripts/parallel-sectors.mjs --site pj-peru --pdfs --pdf-dir output/pjperu-full/pdfs --pdf-concurrency 5 --resume
scripts.scrape:pjperu:full:dry: npm run build && node scripts/parallel-sectors.mjs --site pj-peru --dry-run --limit 20
